title: Syrian Fish Skewers with Lemon
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring marinated fish cooked to perfection on skewers, served with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
instructions: 2. Cut fish into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
3. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
4. Brush skewers with the marinade, making sure to coat all the fish evenly.
5. Place skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
6. Remove skewers from the grill and serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon.
